# tlsR

**tlsR** provides fast, reproducible detection and spatial analysis of
Tertiary Lymphoid Structures (TLS) in multiplexed tissue imaging data
(mIHC, CODEX, IMC, etc.).

## Installation

``` r
# Stable release from CRAN
install.packages("tlsR")

# Development version from GitHub
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("https://github.com/labsyspharm/tlsR/")
```

## Quick start

``` r
library(tlsR)

data(toy_ldata)

# 1. Detect TLS
ldata <- detect_TLS("ToySample", k = 30, ldata = toy_ldata)

# 2. Score each TLS with ICAT
calc_icat("ToySample", tlsID = 1, ldata = ldata)

# 3. Detect T-cell clusters outside TLS
ldata <- detect_tic("ToySample", ldata = ldata)

# 4. Tidy summary table
summarize_TLS(ldata)

# 5. Spatial plot
plot_TLS("ToySample", ldata = ldata)
```

## Data format

`ldata` is a **named list of data frames**, one per sample, each with
columns:

| Column      | Type      | Description                      |
|-------------|-----------|----------------------------------|
| `x`         | numeric   | X coordinate (microns)           |
| `y`         | numeric   | Y coordinate (microns)           |
| `phenotype` | character | `"B cell"`, `"T cell"`, or other |

## Citation

Amiryousefi et al. (2025). *Detection and spatial analysis of tertiary
lymphoid structures in multiplexed tissue imaging.*
<https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.09.21.677465>

## License

MIT © Ali Amiryousefi

# Package index

## TLS Detection

Identify tertiary lymphoid structures in spatial imaging data.

- [`detect_TLS()`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/detect_TLS.md)
  : Detect Tertiary Lymphoid Structures using a KNN-density approach

## T-cell Clusters

Detect tumour-infiltrating T-cell clusters outside TLS.

- [`detect_tic()`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/detect_tic.md)
  : Detect T-cell Immune Clusters (TIC) on the Tissue

## Spatial Scanning

Sliding-window Ripley’s L clustering map.

- [`scan_clustering()`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/scan_clustering.md)
  : Scan Tissue for Local Immune Cell Clustering (Ripley's L Heatmap)

## Characterisation

Score and summarise detected structures.

- [`calc_icat()`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/calc_icat.md)
  : Calculate ICAT (Independent Component Analysis Trace) Index for TLS
- [`summarize_TLS()`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/summarize_TLS.md)
  : Summarize Detected TLS Across Samples

## Visualisation

Publication-ready spatial plots.

- [`plot_TLS()`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/plot_TLS.md)
  : Plot Spatial Map of TLS and T-cell Clusters

## Data

Built-in example dataset.

- [`toy_ldata`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/toy_ldata.md)
  : Toy Multiplexed Imaging Data

## Package

Package-level documentation.

- [`tlsR-package`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/tlsR-package.md)
  [`tlsR`](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/reference/tlsR-package.md)
  : tlsR: Detection and Spatial Analysis of Tertiary Lymphoid Structures

### All vignettes

- [tlsR Workflow: From Quntified Cell Feature Table of the Imaging Data
  to TLS
  Characterisation](https://amiryousefilab.github.io/tlsR/articles/tlsR-workflow.md):
